ddls:
CREATE TABLE "security_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security event */,
  "time_generated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was generated */,
  "event_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the security product that generated the event */,
  "event_product" TEXT /* Product that generated the event */,
  "activity_uuids" TEXT /* List of activity UUIDs associated with the event */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event */,
  "event_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last handled the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_event_vendor FOREIGN KEY ("event_vendor") REFERENCES event_vendors ("vendor_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_event_product FOREIGN KEY ("event_product") REFERENCES event_products ("product_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number for the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Vendor's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor that owns the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the product */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_products_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES event_vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event version */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the event */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES security_events ("event_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each security event
Timestamp when the event was generated
Vendor of the security product that generated the event
List of activity UUIDs associated with the event
ID of the user who last handled the event
Support phone number for the vendor
ID of the vendor that owns the product
Last update date and time of the product
Unique identifier for each event type
Priority level of the event type
Unique identifier for each event version
Description of changes made in this version
Timestamp when the version was created
ID of the user who made the changes
